response:
Subject: Request to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payments Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent account block due to suspicious payments that I did not make. The block has caused significant inconvenience, and I am requesting immediate unblocking.  

I have reviewed the payment history and confirm that all transactions were legitimate. I am prepared to provide additional information if required.  

Thank you for your attention. I look forward to a prompt resolution.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
